name: Portable Cabin
description:
Portable Cabin — Relocatable Structures for Any Use

A SAMAN portable cabin installed at a residential location. No foundation required — placed on a flat paved surface and ready to use on the same day.

You need a structure that goes up quickly, works for your specific use, and can move when your situation changes.

That's what a SAMAN portable cabin is built for. Factory-made MS frame, delivered across South India in 7-21 working days. Sizes from 8×10 ft upward. Starting at Rs 1,95,000.

Unlike a fixed building, a portable cabin isn't permanent — and that's the point. Retailers, homeowners, small businesses, institutions, and factory owners all use the same product in completely different ways. The cabin adapts to the use, not the other way around.

What Every SAMAN Portable Cabin Includes

Every unit is built at our Bangalore factory and checked before dispatch. Standard across all sizes:

  • Structure: MS frame with insulated sandwich panel walls
  • Roof: Single-skin steel, weatherproof
  • Openings: One door, two windows with locks — additional doors and windows on request
  • Electrical: Internal wiring, switchboard, and light fixtures fitted as standard
  • Insulation: Panel walls maintain a 7–8°C difference from outside temperature

Fit-out beyond the standard — AC provision, flooring upgrades, partition walls, plumbing — is built to order at the factory before dispatch. Not retrofitted on site.

If your procurement requires factory documentation, material certification, and pre-dispatch inspection records, the prefabricated portable cabin page covers that build process in full.

Who Uses a Portable Cabin

The same cabin serves very different buyers. Here is where most people fall:

Retailers and small business owners. A portable cabin gives you a shopfront or kiosk without a lease or construction timeline. For a unit specifically configured with a display window, roller shutter, and counter provision, our portable shop cabin covers that setup in detail.

Homeowners and residential buyers. Extra room at home — guest room, study, storage, or garden studio. No foundation required. The small portable cabin is the most common choice for home use — compact, fits 2 people, easy to place in tight spaces.

Schools and training institutions. Extra classroom or admin space during expansion or renovation. Fully functional on delivery — no waiting for on-site construction to finish.

Real portable cabin in daily use as a team office. AC fitted, false ceiling, vinyl flooring, and natural light from windows. Three workstations set up in a 10×20 ft unit.

Small factories and industrial businesses. Store room, supervisor's cabin, quality control room. For long-term industrial placement where you need a heavier structure in a container form factor, our container portable cabin bridges standard cabins and full container units.

Businesses and offices. Workspace at a new location without a commercial lease. Our office portable cabin covers the fitted workspace use case in detail — AC-ready, partition walls, desk configuration.

If you're a construction contractor needing a site cabin for an active project, that's a different product built for rougher conditions. See our construction site cabin range →

Sizes and What Fits Inside

Size Floor Area Fits
8×10 ft 80 sq ft 1–2 people, compact single use
10×10 ft 100 sq ft 2–3 person office or store room
10×12 ft 120 sq ft 3-person workspace or retail cabin
10×20 ft 200 sq ft 5–6 person office or larger shop
20×20 ft 400 sq ft Multi-room or combined layout

10×10 ft fits a private office for 1–2 people. 10×20 ft fits 2 workstations, a meeting area, and a manager cabin. All sizes approximate — custom layouts available.

Need more space than a single unit allows? Our portable cabin building covers multi-room configurations with custom floor plans. If your team will grow and you want to expand without replacing the whole structure, a modular portable cabin is designed for that — add a room when you need it, connected directly to the original unit.

Portable Cabin Price Range

A standard 8×10 ft MS portable cabin starts at Rs 1,95,000. This covers the cabin, delivery within 200 km of Bangalore, and installation at your location.

What moves the price: size, partitions, AC provision, flooring type, extra windows, or plumbing fit-out. A cabin with an attached bathroom starts from Rs 2,65,000 — the portable cabin with toilet page has the full configuration details.

For procurement officers specifying IS-grade MS frame, gauge, and panel spec for tendering, the MS portable cabin page has the technical detail.

When you're ready to confirm stock and delivery timeline, the buy portable cabin page is the right next step.

How We Deliver and Install

  1. Share your requirement — size, use case, location, and when you need it.
  2. Quote in 24 hours — itemized price covering the cabin, transport, and installation.
  3. Order confirmed — factory dispatch within 5 working days.
  4. Delivered and installed — our team places and sets up the cabin at your location. You need a flat surface. We handle everything else.

Every SAMAN portable cabin is delivered and installed at your location. Our team handles the full setup — you only need a flat surface and a power point.

South India deliveries complete within 7 working days of dispatch. When you relocate — 6 months or 3 years later — we can help arrange transport to the new location.

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the difference between a portable cabin and a construction site cabin?

A portable cabin is for any long-term or semi-permanent use — home, office, shop, or storage. A construction site cabin is built specifically for contractor teams on active project sites, with specs for rough conditions and fast deployment. Different products for different buyers.

Can a portable cabin be used as a permanent structure?

Yes. The MS frame lasts 10–15 years with normal maintenance. "Portable" refers to the ability to relocate — not to temporary use. Most of our customers use the same unit for 5 to 10 years before moving or replacing it.

How do I relocate a portable cabin?

You need a flatbed truck or crane vehicle. The cabin is designed to be lifted and moved without structural damage. Most customers relocate 2 to 4 times over the unit's lifetime. We can help arrange transport when you're ready.

Does a portable cabin need a foundation?

No permanent foundation is required. A flat, level surface — concrete, compacted earth, or a simple plinth — is sufficient. This is one of the main advantages over conventional construction.

What is the smallest size available?

Our smallest unit is 8×10 ft — 80 square feet. It fits a desk, chair, and small storage for one person comfortably. For two people, the 10×10 ft is the more practical choice.

Can the cabin be customized before delivery?

Yes. Partition walls, AC provision, flooring, extra windows, and plumbing are all specified at order stage and built in at the factory. Confirm your requirements upfront — changes after delivery are more complex.

Get a quote in 24 hours.

Tell us your use case, size, and location. We'll send you a clear price the same day.

Request a free quote → or call us at 09708989937
